Creator Armour

Creator Armour is a creator collaboration platform for structured brand deals.
Creators publish a collab link with packages, prices, and deal preferences.
Brands can review creator details, choose a package, and submit collaboration offers.

Primary URL: https://creatorarmour.com/

Key pages:
- Homepage: https://creatorarmour.com/
- Discover creators: https://creatorarmour.com/discover
- Creator directory: https://creatorarmour.com/creators
- Blog: https://creatorarmour.com/blog
- Free influencer contract: https://creatorarmour.com/free-influencer-contract
- Creator profile example: https://creatorarmour.com/collab/wowvidushi

Core capabilities:
- Creator collab link for brand inquiries
- Structured package-based offers
- Collaboration workflows and tracking
- Creator-focused business tooling

Brand:
- Primary brand name: Creator Armour
- Alternate spelling: CreatorArmour

Official social profiles:
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/creatorarmour
- X: https://x.com/creatorarmour
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/creatorarmour

Indexing notes:
- Public marketing and creator profile pages may be indexed.
- Authenticated dashboard and admin surfaces are restricted.
